gameTitle: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe

achievements.title: WARNING!
achievements.description: None of the achievements will trigger if you use any cheat, and to change from Normal to Hard you will have to start a new game in Hard or change difficulty in the title screen or any level, if you do, leave and enter the level again.
achievements.author: Maximdraco
